title: HIV Self-Test Protocol
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.izscf6e

steps.instruction: Exacto ® Test HIV (Biosynex). A drop of blood obtained from the fingertip was placed with the sampler stick into the SQUARE well BLOOD of the test cassette, and two drops of diluent was shed in the ROUND wells DILUENT of the test cassette. The results was read after waiting 10 minutes.

Alere Determine™ HIV-1/2 (Alere Medical Co. Ltd., Matsudo-shi, Chiba-ken, Japan). 50 μL of whole blood was applied with precision pipette to the sample pad. After one minute, one drop of Chase Buffer was applied to the sample pad. Finally, the results was read after waiting 15 minutes.

Uni-Gold™ HIV (Trinity Biotech Manufacturing Ltd., Bray, Co. Wicklow, Ireland). After have removed from storage at 2-8°C, allow the controls to reach room temperature prior to use, and mix contents of vials by gentle swirling or inversion, 50 μL of whole blood was applied with precision pipette for carried out Uni-Gold™ HIV-1/2 assay. The results was read after waiting 20 minutes.

recomLine HIV 1 & HIV 2 IgG (Biosynex, France). In brief, for washing, the plastic cover from the incubation trays was carefully removed, serum dilution was siphoned from the individual wells and 2 ml of ready to use wash buffer was pipetted into each well and was washed for 5 minutes with gentle shaking and then siphoned off the wash buffer. Then, 2 ml of ready-to-use conjugate solution was added and incubated for 45 minutes with gentle shaking. For the substrate reaction, 1.5 ml of ready-to-use substrate solution was added and incubated for 8 minutes while shaking gently. For stopping the reaction, it was washed at least three times briefly with deionisied water. Finally, the strips was dried between 2 layers of absorbent paper for 2 hours prior to analysis.

Amplix® (Strasbourg, France). For HIV-1 viral load targeting gag and LTR genes. Extracted nucleic acids in 90 minutes per run were eluted in 50 µl of elution buffer with the Amplix® viral extraction kit (Biosynex). For HIV-1 RNA quantification, a premix mixture was constituted by combining 50 µl of eluate and lyophilized PCR reagents.

Abbott RealTime HIV-1 assay (Abbott Molecular Inc, IL, USA). For HIV-1 viral load targeting pol integrase region of the HIV-1 genome. 0.6 mL of plasma volume was used for assay protocol of The Abbott RealTime HIV-1 assay (Abbott Molecular Inc, IL, USA).
